title: Conventional Cubes
description: Over 200 cosmetic blocks from classic video games and original creations
body:
All of the cosmetic blocks from Engination, plus several new ones, over 200 blocks, were removed and are now this standalone mod.

Blocks range from classic video games to new creations and horrible combinations of the two. There are no BlockEntities anywhere in the mod, and everything is safe (in fact, MADE) for decoration!

Note: With classic video games I try to be transparent about where the block inspiration comes from. If you're not sure, just ask! If you have a chance, please play the original games and support their creators!
